name: Universal Repo
subtitle: One of the best app stores!
description: Universal Repo is a curated IPA repository for iOS devices, offering a wide range of ready-to-install apps, utilities, and tweaks for sideloading tools like Scarlet, SideStore, AltServer, and other IPA installers.

apps.name: UTM SE
apps.subtitle: A simplified UTM build for running virtual machines on iPhone and iPad.
apps.localizedDescription: UTM SE is a streamlined version of UTM designed for iOS and iPadOS devices, allowing users to run virtual machines without JIT. Compatible with iOS 14.0+.

apps.name: UTM
apps.subtitle: Run Windows, Linux, and other operating systems.
apps.localizedDescription: UTM is a virtualization app for iOS 14.0+ built on QEMU.

apps.name: Flappy Bird
apps.subtitle: A simple Flappy Bird remake.
apps.localizedDescription: Open-source Flappy Bird clone for iOS 11.0+.

apps.name: OldOS
apps.subtitle: Classic iOS recreation experience.
apps.localizedDescription: OldOS recreates early iPhone OS UI for iOS 14.0+ devices.

apps.name: iPogo
apps.subtitle: Enhanced Pokémon GO experience.
apps.localizedDescription: Modified Pokémon GO client with added features. iOS compatibility varies by version.
